final:
module comparator2bit (
	input clk,
	input [1:0] a,
	input [1:0] b,
	output reg a_gt_b,
	output reg a_lt_b,
	output reg a_eq_b);

	always @(posedge clk) begin
		a_gt_b <= (a > b);
		a_lt_b <= (a < b);
		a_eq_b <= (a == b);
	end
	
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      a_gt_b <= ~a & ~b; a_lt_b <= a & ~b; a_eq_b <= ~a & b;
    end
  end

endmodule
